steps.t: The rivers of Sirith can be found throughout Upper and Lower Lebennin. The Sirith flows out of Tumladen, the Celos joins Sirith to the north of Erynos…
Roamingstar, the Maiden of Gilrain can be found in her glade to the north-east of Linhir in Dor-en-Ernil. You have found and spoken to three of the Fi…
